title: 2026 Energy Market Outlook
snippet:
This blog offers a look ahead into 2026, examining how Europe’s energy markets are responding to supply shocks, outages, and rapid change

The post 2026 Energy Market Outlook appeared first on
ai_summary: A forward-looking analysis of European energy market trends for 2026, including wholesale price drivers and market structure changes that could affect tem's wholesale purchasing and customer pricing strategy.
ai_reasoning: General market outlook piece with relevance to tem's wholesale exposure and medium-term business planning, but no specific mention of tem, competitors, regulatory changes, or actionable insights. Background reading appropriate for understanding market context.
